entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sourcePackage` TEXT NOT NULL, `appLabel` TEXT, `contentPreview` TEXT NOT NULL, `fullContent` TEXT NOT NULL, `mimeType` TEXT, `hash` TEXT NOT NULL, `clipType` TEXT NOT NULL, `isSensitive` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isArchived` INTEGER NOT NULL, `tags` TEXT)

indices.name: index_clips_sourcePackage_timestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_clips_sourcePackage_timestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`sourcePackage` DESC, `timestamp` DESC)

indices.name: index_clips_isArchived_timestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_clips_isArchived_timestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`isArchived` ASC, `timestamp` DESC)

indices.name: index_clips_isArchived_clipType_timestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_clips_isArchived_clipType_timestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`isArchived` ASC, `clipType` ASC, `timestamp` DESC)

indices.name: index_clips_hash
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_clips_hash` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`hash`)

indices.name: index_clips_isArchived_timestamp_contentPreview
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_clips_isArchived_timestamp_contentPreview` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`isArchived`, `timestamp`, `contentPreview`)

contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_clips_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `clips` BEGIN DELETE FROM `clips_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_clips_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `clips` BEGIN DELETE FROM `clips_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_clips_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `clips` BEGIN INSERT INTO `clips_fts`(`docid`, `contentPreview`, `fullContent`, `tags`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`contentPreview`, NEW.`fullContent`, NEW.`tags`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_clips_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `clips` BEGIN INSERT INTO `clips_fts`(`docid`, `contentPreview`, `fullContent`, `tags`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`contentPreview`, NEW.`fullContent`, NEW.`tags`); END
entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`contentPreview` TEXT NOT NULL, `fullContent` TEXT NOT NULL, `tags` TEXT, tokenize=unicode61, content=`clips`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '45e477ef1ec0a0275460a5535d974a4f')
